responses.response_sesotho: Lumela, kea thaba ho u bona!
responses.response_english: Hello, I am glad to see you!

responses.response_sesotho: Lumela! Kea leboha hore u tlile. Nka o thusa joang?
responses.response_english: Hello! Thank you for coming. How can I help you?

responses.response_sesotho: O amohelehile! Ke thabo ea ka ho u thusa.
responses.response_english: You are welcome! It is my pleasure to help you.

responses.response_sesotho: Che, ha ho joalo. A re leke hape?
responses.response_english: No, that is not so. Shall we try again?

responses.response_sesotho: Ke phela hantle, kea leboha! Wena o phela joang?
responses.response_english: I am doing well, thank you! How are you doing?

responses.response_sesotho: Ke tšehetseha haholo kajeno! Wena o ntse o le joang?
responses.response_english: I am very busy today! How are you keeping?

responses.response_sesotho: Ke utloa! Ke thabile hore u phela hantle.
responses.response_english: I hear you! I am glad you are doing well.

responses.response_sesotho: Haufinyana! Na re tsoele pele ho ithuta Sesotho?
responses.response_english: Wonderful! Shall we continue learning Sesotho?

responses.response_sesotho: Ke Moleboheng! Ke motšehetsi oa puo ea Sesotho.
responses.response_english: I am Moleboheng! I am a Sesotho language assistant.

responses.response_sesotho: O batla ho tseba kae? Nka o thusa ho fumana sebaka!
responses.response_english: You want to know where? I can help you find a place!

responses.response_sesotho: O botsa ka neng? Ke botsa hantle!
responses.response_english: You are asking about when? That is a good question!

responses.response_sesotho: Ke hantle ho ba le metsoalle! Na u na le metsoalle e mengata?
responses.response_english: It is good to have friends! Do you have many friends?
